chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 299 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «اَلدَّاءُ ثَلاَثَةٌ وَ اَلدَّوَاءُ ثَلاَثَةٌ فَأَمَّا اَلدَّاءُ فَالدَّمُ وَ اَلْمِرَّةُ وَ اَلْبَلْغَمُ فَدَوَاءُ اَلدَّمِ اَلْحِجَامَةُ وَ دَوَاءُ اَلْبَلْغَمِ اَلْحَمَّامُ وَ دَوَاءُ اَلْمِرَّةِ اَلْمَشِيُّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.299 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Disease is of three types, and the cure is of three types : As for the ailments, they are blood, bile, and phlegm. The cure for blood is with cupping, the cure for phlegm is the bathhouse, and the cure for bile is walking."
